4  Toxicokinetics of Imidacloprid

  • Show All Code
  • Hide All Code

4.1 Results of the experiment

4.1.1 Data importation

Notations :

  • Date_start : Start of the experiement (t0)
  • Molecule : Substance to which the earthworm is exposed
  • Dose : Exposure dose (mg/kg)
  • ID_recipient : Recipient in which the soil was prepared
  • ID_camp : ID of the earthworm campagne and generation (see XXX for more information)
  • ID : ID of the earthworm
  • Nb_rep : Identification number of the replicate
  • Time_point : Time point to which the earthworm is dedicated
  • Phase : Uptake or Elimination phase
  • Time_introduction_D0 : Time of the day when the earthworm was introduced into his contaminated cosm
  • w0 : Body weight at t0
  • w_Tp : Body weight at the given time point
  • w_frozen : Body weight before congelation
  • C_worm : Measured concentration of the substance in the earthworm
  • C_soil : Measured concentration of the substance in the soil at the given time point
Code 
Levels_time_points <- c(as.character(seq(1,3,1)), "3b", as.character(seq(4,7,1)), "7b", as.character(seq(8,14,1)), "14b", as.character(seq(15,42,1)))

df_TK_IMD <- f_read_data_TK("IMD") %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ na_if(.x, -1)))


df_TK_IMD <- df_TK_IMD |> 
  mutate(
    Time = t,
    CiEPX = C_worm_EPX,
    CiIMD = C_worm_IMD,
    Weight = Weight_nog,
    Time_point_f = as.factor(Time_point)
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(Time, CiEPX, CiIMD, Weight, w, Molecule, ID, expo, Time_point_f, Nb_rep, Experiment) |> 
  mutate(
    CiEPX = na_if(CiEPX, -1),
    CiIMD = na_if(CiIMD, -1)
    )|> 
  mutate(
    Time_point_f = fct_relevel(Time_point_f, Levels_time_points)
  )

df_TK_IMD_mean <- df_TK_IMD |> 
  dplyr::select(-ID) |> 
  group_by(Time) |> 
  summarise(
    CiEPX = exp(mean(log(CiEPX[CiEPX > 0]), na.rm = TRUE)),
    CiIMD = exp(mean(log(CiIMD[CiIMD > 0]), na.rm = TRUE)),
    Weight = mean(Weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    w = mean(w, na.rm = TRUE),
    expo = mean(expo),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  mutate(Molecule = "IMD")

4.1.2 Initial state

Code 
summary(subset(df_TK_IMD, Time==0 & Experiment == "TK"))
      Time       CiEPX          CiIMD         Weight             w

Code 
# Weights at t=0
plot_D0 <- ggplot(
  data=subset(df_TK_IMD, Time==0), 
  aes(
    x=Time_point_f, 
    y=w, 
    color=Molecule, 
    fill=Molecule
    )
  )+

  geom_boxplot(alpha=0.2)+
  geom_dotplot(
    binaxis='y', 
    stackdir='center', 
    dotsize=0.7, 
    alpha=0.7
    )+
  facet_wrap(~Molecule+Experiment, ncol=2, scales="free_x")+
  
  scale_color_manual(values=col_Molecule)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=col_Molecule)+

  labs(x="Dose (mg/kg)", y="Weight (mg)")+
  

  theme_classic(14)+
  theme(
    legend.position = "none", 
    legend.title=element_text(size=sizetitle-2,face="bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size=sizetitle-2,face="plain"),
    
    title=element_text(size=sizetitle, face="bold"), 
    
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size=sizetitle,face="plain"),
    
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=sizetitle-4),
    axis.line.x=element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x=element_blank(),
    
    
    strip.background = element_rect(
      color="black", 
      #fill=Nord_snow[3], 
      size=0, 
      linetype="solid"
      ),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
plot_D0

4.1.3 Growth curves

Time points with a “b” corresponds to the experiment TK BIS where earthworms were massaged instead of fasting for a day.

Code 
col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4])
ID_tri <- c(c(1, 9, 17, 25, 33, 41, 49, 57, 65, 73, 81, 89, 97, 107, 115, 123)+4, 140, 143,146)

df_TK_IMD_plot <- df_TK_IMD |> 
  filter(!is.na(Weight)) 

y_segment <- 1.5

df_phases <- df_TK_IMD |> 
  filter(ID %in% ID_tri)|>
  arrange(Time_point_f, Time) |>
  group_by(Time_point_f) |>
  mutate(
    row = row_number(),
    t_start = Time,
    t_end = lead(Time),  
    segment = row,
    y = y_segment
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(t_end)) |>  
  dplyr::select(Time_point_f, segment, t_start, t_end, y, Experiment) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(
    Time_point = as.numeric(as.character(Time_point_f)),
    Phase = case_when(
      (segment == 1 & Time_point <= 21) ~ 1,
      (segment == 2 & Time_point <= 21) ~ 3,
      (segment == 1 & Time_point > 21) ~ 1,
      (segment == 2 & Time_point > 21) ~ 2,
      (segment == 3 & Time_point > 21) ~ 3,
      (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 1)~1,
      (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 2)~3
    )
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    Time_point_f = fct_relevel(Time_point_f, Levels_time_points)
  )


p_IMD <- ggplot() +
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  
  geom_line(
    data = df_TK_IMD_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = w,
      group = ID
      ),
    alpha=1,
    color = col_IMD,
    linetype = "dashed"
    ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_TK_IMD,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = w,
      group = ID
      ),
    alpha=0.5,
    color = col_IMD
    ) +

  facet_wrap(~Time_point_f)+
  labs(
    title = "Growth Curves",
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Weight",
    color = ""
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +  # Thème minimaliste
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.background = element_rect(
      color="black", 
      fill=Nord_snow[3], 
      size=0, 
      linetype="solid"
      ),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

p_IMD

4.1.4 Measured internal concentrations

Code 
p <- ggplot(
  data = df_TK_IMD,
  aes(
    x = Time
  )
  )+
  geom_point(
    mapping = aes(
      y = CiIMD,
    color = Experiment,
    fill = Experiment
    )
  )+
  facet_wrap(~Molecule, ncol = 2, scales = "free")+
  scale_color_manual(values = c(col_IMD, Nord_aurora[4]))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(col_IMD, Nord_aurora[4]))+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Concentration in earthworm (ng/g)"
  )+
 # lims(x=c(13,16))+
  theme_minimal()
p

4.2 Modeling of the toxicokinetics

Names of models :

  • C1 : One compartement only.
  • C1P : One compartment and exposure in Petri dishes via gut content.
  • C1N : One compartement, no uptake and no elimination in Petri dishes.
  • C2 : Two compartements.

4.2.1 In files creation for MCMC

Creation of the MCSim .in files :

Code 
Molecule <- "IMD"

######## C1 #################################################################
path_mod_IMD_C1 <- here::here("mod/TK_IMD_C1")
path_fig_C1 <- here::here("fig/TK_single/IMD_C1/")

Nb_Iter <- 100000
seeds <- c(C1 = 3335, C2 = 2420, C3 = 1242)

text_priors <- "Distrib(kuIMD,     LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max 
Distrib(keIMD,    LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max

Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal,   0.005,   0.0010,    -0.5,    1); # mean, sd, min, max
Distrib (Vr_a_growth,  TruncNormal, 0.0015, 0.01, 0, 1);

Distrib(Sigma_W,     TruncNormal,  0.03, 0.01, 0.0001, 1);
Distrib(Sigma_CiIMD, TruncNormal,  3.0, 3.0,    1, 1000);"

text_likelihood <- "Likelihood(CiIMD,  LogNormal, Prediction(CiIMD),  Sigma_CiIMD);  # Calcul des vraisemblances (geometric mean, geometric standard deviation)
Likelihood(Weight, Normal,    Prediction(Weight), Sigma_W);      # Calcul des vraisemblances"

text_param_ind <- "Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal, a_growth,  Vr_a_growth, -1.0, 1);"

f_In_tot(path_mod_IMD_C1, Molecule, text_priors, text_likelihood, text_param_ind, Nb_Iter, seeds)

######## C1P #################################################################
path_mod_IMD_C1P <- here::here("mod/TK_IMD_C1P")
path_fig_C1P <- here::here("fig/TK_single/IMD_C1P/")

Nb_Iter <- 100000
seeds <- c(C1 = 3332, C2 = 2423, C3 = 1211)

text_priors <- "Distrib(kuIMD,     LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max 
Distrib(keIMD,    LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max

Distrib(phi,     Uniform,   0.0, 1); # min, max

Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal,   0.005,   0.0010,    -0.5,    1); # mean, sd, min, max
Distrib (Vr_a_growth,  TruncNormal, 0.0015, 0.01, 0, 1);

Distrib(Sigma_W,     TruncNormal,  0.03, 0.01, 0.0001, 1);
Distrib(Sigma_CiIMD, TruncNormal,  3.0, 3.0,    1, 1000);"

text_likelihood <- "Likelihood(CiIMD,  LogNormal, Prediction(CiIMD),  Sigma_CiIMD);  # Calcul des vraisemblances (geometric mean, geometric standard deviation)
Likelihood(Weight, Normal,    Prediction(Weight), Sigma_W);      # Calcul des vraisemblances"

text_param_ind <- "Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal, a_growth,  Vr_a_growth, -1.0, 1);"

f_In_tot(path_mod_IMD_C1P, Molecule, text_priors, text_likelihood, text_param_ind, Nb_Iter, seeds)

######## C1N #################################################################
path_mod_IMD_C1N <- here::here("mod/TK_IMD_C1N")
path_fig_C1N <- here::here("fig/TK_single/IMD_C1N/")

Nb_Iter <- 100000
seeds <- c(C1 = 3335, C2 = 2420, C3 = 1242)

text_priors <- "Distrib(kuIMD,     LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max 
Distrib(keIMD,    LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max

Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal,   0.005,   0.0010,    -0.5,    1); # mean, sd, min, max
Distrib (Vr_a_growth,  TruncNormal, 0.0015, 0.01, 0, 1);

Distrib(Sigma_W,     TruncNormal,  0.03, 0.01, 0.0001, 1);
Distrib(Sigma_CiIMD, TruncNormal,  3.0, 3.0,    1, 1000);"

text_likelihood <- "Likelihood(CiIMD,  LogNormal, Prediction(CiIMD),  Sigma_CiIMD);  # Calcul des vraisemblances (geometric mean, geometric standard deviation)
Likelihood(Weight, Normal,    Prediction(Weight), Sigma_W);      # Calcul des vraisemblances"

text_param_ind <- "Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal, a_growth,  Vr_a_growth, -1.0, 1);"

f_In_tot(path_mod_IMD_C1N, Molecule, text_priors, text_likelihood, text_param_ind, Nb_Iter, seeds)

######## C2 #################################################################
path_mod_IMD_C2 <- here::here("mod/TK_IMD_C2")
path_fig_C2 <- here::here("fig/TK_single/IMD_C2/")

Nb_Iter <- 100000
seeds <- c(C1 = 3354, C2 = 2423, C3 = 1211)

text_priors <- "Distrib(kuIMD,     LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max 
Distrib(keIMD,    LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max

Distrib(kperiph,     LogUniform,   0.00001, 100000); # min, max

Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal,   0.005,   0.0010,    -0.5,    1); # mean, sd, min, max
Distrib (Vr_a_growth,  TruncNormal, 0.0015, 0.01, 0, 1);

Distrib(Sigma_W,     TruncNormal,  0.03, 0.01, 0.0001, 1);
Distrib(Sigma_CiIMD, TruncNormal,  3.0, 3.0,    1, 1000);"

text_likelihood <- "Likelihood(CiIMD,  LogNormal, Prediction(CiIMD),  Sigma_CiIMD);  # Calcul des vraisemblances (geometric mean, geometric standard deviation)
Likelihood(Weight, Normal,    Prediction(Weight), Sigma_W);      # Calcul des vraisemblances"

text_param_ind <- "Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal, a_growth,  Vr_a_growth, -1.0, 1);"

f_In_tot(path_mod_IMD_C2, Molecule, text_priors, text_likelihood, text_param_ind, Nb_Iter, seeds)

######## C2P #################################################################

path_mod_IMD_C2P <- here::here("mod/TK_IMD_C2P")
path_fig_C2P <- here::here("fig/TK_single/IMD_C2P/")

Nb_Iter <- 100000
seeds <- c(C1 = 3332, C2 = 66669, C3 = 1211)

text_priors <- "Distrib(kuIMD,     LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max 
Distrib(keIMD,    LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max

Distrib(kperiph,     LogUniform,   0.00001, 100000); # min, max 
Distrib(phi,     Uniform,   0.0, 1); # min, max

Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal,   0.005,   0.0010,    -0.5,    1); # mean, sd, min, max
Distrib (Vr_a_growth,  TruncNormal, 0.0015, 0.01, 0, 1);

Distrib(Sigma_W,     TruncNormal,  0.03, 0.01, 0.0001, 1);
Distrib(Sigma_CiIMD, TruncNormal,  3.0, 3.0,    1, 1000);"

text_likelihood <- "Likelihood(CiIMD,  LogNormal, Prediction(CiIMD),  Sigma_CiIMD);  # Calcul des vraisemblances (geometric mean, geometric standard deviation)
Likelihood(Weight, Normal,    Prediction(Weight), Sigma_W);      # Calcul des vraisemblances"

text_param_ind <- "Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal, a_growth,  Vr_a_growth, -1.0, 1);"

f_In_tot(path_mod_IMD_C2P, Molecule, text_priors, text_likelihood, text_param_ind, Nb_Iter, seeds)

######## C2N #################################################################

path_mod_IMD_C2N <- here::here("mod/TK_IMD_C2N")
path_fig_C2N <- here::here("fig/TK_single/IMD_C2N/")

Nb_Iter <- 100000
seeds <- c(C1 = 33383, C2 = 2423, C3 = 121551)

text_priors <- "Distrib(kuIMD,     LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max 
Distrib(keIMD,    LogUniform,   0.0001, 100000); # min, max

Distrib(kperiph,     LogUniform,   0.00001, 100000); # min, max 

Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal,   0.005,   0.0010,    -0.5,    1); # mean, sd, min, max
Distrib (Vr_a_growth,  TruncNormal, 0.0015, 0.01, 0, 1);

Distrib(Sigma_W,     TruncNormal,  0.03, 0.01, 0.0001, 1);
Distrib(Sigma_CiIMD, TruncNormal,  3.0, 3.0,    1, 1000);"

text_likelihood <- "Likelihood(CiIMD,  LogNormal, Prediction(CiIMD),  Sigma_CiIMD);  # Calcul des vraisemblances (geometric mean, geometric standard deviation)
Likelihood(Weight, Normal,    Prediction(Weight), Sigma_W);      # Calcul des vraisemblances"

text_param_ind <- "Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal, a_growth,  Vr_a_growth, -1.0, 1);"

f_In_tot(path_mod_IMD_C2N, Molecule, text_priors, text_likelihood, text_param_ind, Nb_Iter, seeds)

# ./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_C1.in

Model fit on data :

Code 
pwd
cd ..
cd ..
cd mod/TK_IMD
pwd

makemcsim m_TK_IMD.model &
for j in $(seq 1 3); do
./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_C${j}.in
done

The first step is to retrieve the information of the MCMC simulation experiments.

The inputs :

  • Input files must a name like “xxxxx.C1.in”
  • Output files must a name like “xxxxx.Cx1.out”

4.2.2 Get MCMC results

Code 
######### C1 #########################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C1 <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_IMD_C1)

NC_C1 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1$NC
Nb_param_C1 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Nb_param
Nb_experiment_C1 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Nb_experiment
Nb_iter_kept_C1 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Nb_iter_kept
N_iter_setpoint_C1 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1$N_iter_setpoint
L_parameters_C1 <- unique(MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Priors$Nom)

######### C1P #########################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C1P <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_IMD_C1P)

NC_C1P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1P$NC
Nb_param_C1P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1P$Nb_param
Nb_experiment_C1P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1P$Nb_experiment
Nb_iter_kept_C1P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1P$Nb_iter_kept
N_iter_setpoint_C1P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1P$N_iter_setpoint
L_parameters_C1P <- unique(MCMC_out_IMD_C1P$Priors$Nom)

######### C1N #########################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C1N <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_IMD_C1N)

NC_C1N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1N$NC
Nb_param_C1N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1N$Nb_param
Nb_experiment_C1N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1N$Nb_experiment
Nb_iter_kept_C1N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1N$Nb_iter_kept
N_iter_setpoint_C1N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1N$N_iter_setpoint
L_parameters_C1N <- unique(MCMC_out_IMD_C1N$Priors$Nom)

######### C2 #########################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C2 <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_IMD_C2)

NC_C2 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2$NC
Nb_param_C2 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2$Nb_param
Nb_experiment_C2 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2$Nb_experiment
Nb_iter_kept_C2 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2$Nb_iter_kept
N_iter_setpoint_C2 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2$N_iter_setpoint
L_parameters_C2 <- unique(MCMC_out_IMD_C2$Priors$Nom)

######### C2P #########################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C2P <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_IMD_C2P)

NC_C2P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$NC
Nb_param_C2P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$Nb_param
Nb_experiment_C2P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$Nb_experiment
Nb_iter_kept_C2P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$Nb_iter_kept
N_iter_setpoint_C2P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$N_iter_setpoint
L_parameters_C2P <- unique(MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$Priors$Nom)

######### C2N #########################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C2N <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_IMD_C2N)

NC_C2N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2N$NC
Nb_param_C2N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2N$Nb_param
Nb_experiment_C2N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2N$Nb_experiment
Nb_iter_kept_C2N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2N$Nb_iter_kept
N_iter_setpoint_C2N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2N$N_iter_setpoint
L_parameters_C2N <- unique(MCMC_out_IMD_C2N$Priors$Nom)
  • C1
    • The number of chains used : 3
    • The number of parameters : 6
    • The number of experiments : 72
    • The number of last iterations used to describe the posterior distribution : 10^{4}
    • The number of last iterations used to create the tab_setpoint.out file : 333
  • C1P
    • The number of parameters : 7
  • C1N
    • The number of parameters : 6
  • C2
    • The number of parameters : 7

4.2.3 Priors used for the model

  • C1
  • C1P
  • C1N
  • C2
  • C2P
  • C2N
Code 
colnames(MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Priors) <- c("Nom", "Distribution", "P1", "P2", "P3", "P4")

MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Priors |> datatable(
  options = list(
    dom = 't',
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all")
      )
    ),
  class="hover"
  )
Code 
#MCMC_out_IMD$Priors
Code 
n_samples <- 1e6 # Simulation of the distribution

df_priors_dist_C1 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Priors |> 
  dplyr::select(Nom, Distribution, P1, P2, P3, P4) |> 
  rowwise() |> 
  mutate(samples = case_when(
    Distribution == "Uniform" ~ list(runif(n_samples, min = P1, max = P2)),
    Distribution == "Normal" ~ list(rnorm(n_samples, mean = P1, sd = P2)),
    Distribution == "LogUniform" ~ list(exp(runif(n_samples, min = log(P1), max = log(P2)))),
    Distribution == "TruncNormal" ~ list(rtruncnorm(n_samples, a = P3, b = P4, mean = P1, sd = P2))
  )) |> 
  unnest(samples) |> 
  filter(!(Nom %in% c("kuIMD", "keIMD") & samples > 0.05))

col_prior <- Nord_polar[4]
alpha_prior <- 0.5

p_priors <- ggplot() +
  facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+
  
  stat_halfeye(
    data = df_priors_dist_C1, 
    aes(
       x = samples
       ),
    alpha = alpha_prior,
    fill = col_prior,
    color = col_prior,
    normalize = "xy" 
    ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Priors distributions", 
    x = "Parameter value", 
    y = "Density"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_priors
Code 
colnames(MCMC_out_IMD_C1P$Priors) <- c("Nom", "Distribution", "P1", "P2", "P3", "P4")

4.2.4 Chains

  • C1
  • C1P
  • C1N
  • C2
  • C2P
  • C2N
Code 
p_chains <-  
  ggplot(
    data = MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Chains |> filter(Iteration !=1), 
    aes(
      x = Iteration, 
      y = value, 
      color = as.factor(Chain), 
      group = as.factor(Chain)
      )
  )+
  geom_line(alpha=0.7)+
  scale_y_log10()+
  facet_wrap(~Parameter, scales = "free", ncol = 2)+
  
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", values = nord(palette = "frost"))+
  
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "right", 
    title=element_text(size=12, face="plain"), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face="plain"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill="white")
    )

p_chains
Code

We can also take a look at the likelihood and the deviance ratio.

  • C1
  • C1P
  • C1N
  • C2
  • C2P
  • C2N
Code 
p1 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_IMD_C1$df_LnPost_start, 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = LnPosterior, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = "First half iterations", 
    y = "LnPosterior"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_IMD_C1$df_LnPost |> filter(iteration !=1), 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = LnPosterior, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "LnPosterior"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p3 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_IMD_C1$df_Devc |>  filter(iteration != 1), 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = RatioDeviance, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "Ratio Deviance"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_LL <- p1 + p2 + p3 +
  plot_layout(ncol=3, guides = "collect")
p_LL

    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "LnPosterior"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p3 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$df_Devc |>  filter(iteration != 1), 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = RatioDeviance, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "Ratio Deviance"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_LL <- p1 + p2 + p3 +
  plot_layout(ncol=3, guides = "collect")
p_LL
Code 
p1 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_IMD_C2N$df_LnPost_start, 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = LnPosterior, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = "First half iterations", 
    y = "LnPosterior"

Code 
# Large format per chain
mcmc_list_C1 <- lapply(split(MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Chains, MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Chains$Chain), function(d) {
  wide <- d %>%
    dplyr::select(Iteration, Parameter, value) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Parameter, values_from = value) %>%
    arrange(Iteration)
  
  mcmc(as.matrix(wide[,-1]))
})

mcmc_list_C1 <- as.mcmc.list(mcmc_list_C1)
Code 
  par(mfrow=c(1,3))

  gelman.plot(mcmc_list_C1,
            bin.width = 10,      # Number of observations per segment,
            # first segment --> at least 50 iterations.
            max.bins = 50,       # Maximum number of bins, excluding the last one
            confidence = 0.95,   # Coverage probability of confidence interval.
            transform = FALSE,   # improve the normality of the distribution
            autoburnin=TRUE)     # Remove first half of sequence

  
  gelman <- gelman.diag(mcmc_list_C1, confidence = 0.95, transform=FALSE, autoburnin=TRUE, multivariate=TRUE)
  print(gelman)
Potential scale reduction factors:

               Point est. Upper C.I.
a_growth.1.          1.01       1.02
keIMD.1.             1.00       1.01
kuIMD.1.             1.00       1.01
Sigma_CiIMD.1.       1.00       1.00
Sigma_W.1.           1.04       1.14
Vr_a_growth.1.       1.06       1.21

Multivariate psrf

1.05

mcmc_list_corr <- mcmc.list(
  lapply(mcmc_list_C1, function(x) {
    mcmc(as.matrix(x)[-1, , drop = FALSE])  # <- reconvertir en mcmc
  })
)

colramp_aurora <- colorRampPalette(rev(Nord_aurora[1:4]))
ipairs(as.matrix(mcmc_list_corr), colramp = colramp_aurora, pixs=0.25, cex.diag = 0.5)

4.2.5 Parameter estimation results

  • C1
  • C1P
  • C1N
  • C2
  • C2P
  • C2N
Code 
alpha_prior <- 0.5
alpha_post <- 0.5
col_prior <- Nord_snow[1]
col_post <- col_IMD

MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Chains_plot <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) |> 
  filter(!(Nom == "kuIMD" & value > 10))

p_post <- ggplot() +
  
  # Priors
  stat_halfeye(
    data = df_priors_dist_C1,
    aes(
       x = samples,
       #y = ..scaled..
       ),
    alpha = alpha_prior,
    fill = col_prior,
    color = col_prior,
    normalize = "xy"
    ) +
  
  # Posterior
  stat_halfeye(
    data = subset(MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Chains_plot, Nom %in% L_parameters_C1),
    mapping = aes(
      x=value
    ),
    fill = col_post,
    color = col_post,
    alpha = alpha_post,
    normalize = "xy"
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+
  labs(
    title = "Posterior and prior distributions", 
    x = "Parameter value", 
    y = "Density"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    title=element_markdown(face="bold")
  )

p_post
Code

Code 
f_get_mode <- function(x) {
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))]
}

####### C1 ##########################################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Chains <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) 

ku_samples_C1 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuIMD")
ke_samples_C1 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keIMD")

BCF_samples_C1 <- ku_samples_C1$value / ke_samples_C1$value

BCF_mode_C1 <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples_C1)
BCF_CI_C1 <- quantile(BCF_samples_C1, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
BCF_CI_low_C1 <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C1[1])
BCF_CI_up_C1 <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C1[2])
BCF_min_C1 <- min(BCF_samples_C1)
BCF_max_C1 <- max(BCF_samples_C1)
BCF_mean_C1 <- mean(BCF_samples_C1)
BCF_sd_C1 <- sd(BCF_samples_C1)

BCF_C1 <- c(
  BCF_mode_C1, 
  BCF_CI_low_C1, BCF_CI_up_C1, 
  BCF_min_C1, BCF_max_C1, 
  BCF_mean_C1, BCF_sd_C1
  )

####### C1P ##########################################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C1P$Chains <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1P$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) 

ku_samples_C1P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1P$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuIMD")
ke_samples_C1P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1P$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keIMD")

BCF_samples_C1P <- ku_samples_C1P$value / ke_samples_C1P$value

BCF_mode_C1P <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples_C1P)
BCF_CI_C1P <- quantile(BCF_samples_C1P, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
BCF_CI_low_C1P <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C1P[1])
BCF_CI_up_C1P <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C1P[2])
BCF_min_C1P <- min(BCF_samples_C1P)
BCF_max_C1P <- max(BCF_samples_C1P)
BCF_mean_C1P <- mean(BCF_samples_C1P)
BCF_sd_C1P <- sd(BCF_samples_C1P)

BCF_C1P <- c(
  BCF_mode_C1P, 
  BCF_CI_low_C1P, BCF_CI_up_C1P, 
  BCF_min_C1P, BCF_max_C1P, 
  BCF_mean_C1P, BCF_sd_C1P
  )

####### C1N ##########################################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C1N$Chains <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1N$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) 

ku_samples_C1N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1N$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuIMD")
ke_samples_C1N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C1N$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keIMD")

BCF_samples_C1N <- ku_samples_C1N$value / ke_samples_C1N$value

BCF_mode_C1N <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples_C1N)
BCF_CI_C1N <- quantile(BCF_samples_C1N, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
BCF_CI_low_C1N <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C1N[1])
BCF_CI_up_C1N <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C1N[2])
BCF_min_C1N <- min(BCF_samples_C1N)
BCF_max_C1N <- max(BCF_samples_C1N)
BCF_mean_C1N <- mean(BCF_samples_C1N)
BCF_sd_C1N <- sd(BCF_samples_C1N)

BCF_C1N <- c(
  BCF_mode_C1N, 
  BCF_CI_low_C1N, BCF_CI_up_C1N, 
  BCF_min_C1N, BCF_max_C1N, 
  BCF_mean_C1N, BCF_sd_C1N
  )

####### C2 ##########################################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C2$Chains <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) 

ku_samples_C2 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuIMD")
ke_samples_C2 <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keIMD")

BCF_samples_C2 <- ku_samples_C2$value / ke_samples_C2$value

BCF_mode_C2 <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples_C2)
BCF_CI_C2 <- quantile(BCF_samples_C2, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
BCF_CI_low_C2 <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C2[1])
BCF_CI_up_C2 <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C2[2])
BCF_min_C2 <- min(BCF_samples_C2)
BCF_max_C2 <- max(BCF_samples_C2)
BCF_mean_C2 <- mean(BCF_samples_C2)
BCF_sd_C2 <- sd(BCF_samples_C2)

BCF_C2 <- c(
  BCF_mode_C2, 
  BCF_CI_low_C2, BCF_CI_up_C2, 
  BCF_min_C2, BCF_max_C2, 
  BCF_mean_C2, BCF_sd_C2
  )

####### C2P ##########################################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$Chains <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) 

ku_samples_C2P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuIMD")
ke_samples_C2P <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2P$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keIMD")

BCF_samples_C2P <- ku_samples_C2P$value / ke_samples_C2P$value

BCF_mode_C2P <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples_C2P)
BCF_CI_C2P <- quantile(BCF_samples_C2P, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
BCF_CI_low_C2P <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C2P[1])
BCF_CI_up_C2P <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C2P[2])
BCF_min_C2P <- min(BCF_samples_C2P)
BCF_max_C2P <- max(BCF_samples_C2P)
BCF_mean_C2P <- mean(BCF_samples_C2P)
BCF_sd_C2P <- sd(BCF_samples_C2P)

BCF_C2P <- c(
  BCF_mode_C2P, 
  BCF_CI_low_C2P, BCF_CI_up_C2P, 
  BCF_min_C2P, BCF_max_C2P, 
  BCF_mean_C2P, BCF_sd_C2P
  )

####### C2N ##########################################################

MCMC_out_IMD_C2N$Chains <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2N$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) 

ku_samples_C2N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2N$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuIMD")
ke_samples_C2N <- MCMC_out_IMD_C2N$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keIMD")

BCF_samples_C2N <- ku_samples_C2N$value / ke_samples_C2N$value

BCF_mode_C2N <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples_C2N)
BCF_CI_C2N <- quantile(BCF_samples_C2N, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
BCF_CI_low_C2N <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C2N[1])
BCF_CI_up_C2N <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C2N[2])
BCF_min_C2N <- min(BCF_samples_C2N)
BCF_max_C2N <- max(BCF_samples_C2N)
BCF_mean_C2N <- mean(BCF_samples_C2N)
BCF_sd_C2N <- sd(BCF_samples_C2N)

BCF_C2N <- c(
  BCF_mode_C2N, 
  BCF_CI_low_C2N, BCF_CI_up_C2N, 
  BCF_min_C2N, BCF_max_C2N, 
  BCF_mean_C2N, BCF_sd_C2N
  )

Code 
Summary_res_IMD_tmp_C1 <- cbind(as.data.frame(MCMC_out_IMD_C1$Summary_res)[1:length(L_parameters_C1)], BCF_C1)

Summary_res_IMD_f_C1 <- Summary_res_IMD_tmp_C1 |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), signif, 2))

Summary_res_IMD_f_C1 |> datatable(
  options = list(
    dom = 't',
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all")
      )
    ),
  class="hover"
  )
Code 
# Summary_res_IMD_f
Code 
# BIC calculation

LL <- f_get_mode(MCMC_out_IMD_C1$df_LnData$LnData)

n <- length(na.omit(df_TK_IMD$Weight)) + length(na.omit(df_TK_IMD$CiIMD))
k <- Nb_param_C1 -2

BIC <- -2*LL + k*log(n)

cat("Number of observations, n = ", n,"\nNumber of parameters, k = ", k, "\nLog-likelihood, LL = ", LL, "\nBIC = ", BIC)
Number of observations, n =  357 
Number of parameters, k =  4 
Log-likelihood, LL =  -259.0445 
BIC =  541.5999

4.2.6 Comparison of observed vs. predicted data

Creation of the .in files that will enable the obtention of the prediction of the model for all of our data points :

Code 
######## C1 #########################################
l_param_name_C1 <- "kuIMD, keIMD, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_IMD_C1,Molecule, l_param_name_C1)

######## C1P #########################################
l_param_name_C1P <- "kuIMD, keIMD, phi, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_IMD_C1P,Molecule, l_param_name_C1P)

######## C1N #########################################
l_param_name_C1N <- "kuIMD, keIMD, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_IMD_C1N,Molecule, l_param_name_C1N)

######## C2 #########################################
l_param_name_C2 <- "kuIMD, keIMD, kperiph, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_IMD_C2,Molecule, l_param_name_C2)

######## C2P #########################################
l_param_name_C2P <- "kuIMD, keIMD, kperiph, phi, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_IMD_C2P,Molecule, l_param_name_C2P)

######## C2N #########################################
l_param_name_C2N <- "kuIMD, keIMD, kperiph, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_IMD_C2N,Molecule, l_param_name_C2N)

An example of how to run the simulations for the predicted-observed data is given in the bash code block below. You need to be in the right folder to launch a given model.

Code 
pwd
cd ..
cd ..
cd mod/TK_IMD
pwd

for j in $(seq 1 72); do
./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_Setpoint_ind_${j}.in
done
Code 
Nb_experiment <- Nb_experiment_C1

######### Observed data ######################################################

dObs_ind <- df_TK_IMD |> 
  mutate(
    ID = as.numeric(ID),
    Group_tmp = case_when(
      ID < 65 ~ "Uptake",
      (ID > 64 & ID <= 128) ~ "Elimination",
      ID > 128 ~ "Uptake bis"),
    Group = fct_relevel(Group_tmp, c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Uptake bis"))
    )

colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "Weight"] <- "Weight_obs"
colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "CiIMD"] <- "CiIMD_obs"
colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "t"] <- "Times"

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2])

############ C1 ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C1 <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C1, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C1 <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C1, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C1 <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C1, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C1 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1, Endpt == "CiIMD" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1 <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1 <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C1, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiIMD_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

############ C1P ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C1P <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C1P, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C1P <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C1P, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C1P <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C1P, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C1P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1P, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1P, Endpt == "CiIMD" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1P, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C1P, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiIMD_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

############ C1N ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C1N <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C1N, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C1N <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C1N, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C1N <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C1N, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C1N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1N, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1N, Endpt == "CiIMD" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C1N, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C1N, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiIMD_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

############ C2 ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C2 <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C2, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2 <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C2, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2 <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "CiIMD" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2 <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2 <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C2, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiIMD_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

############ C2P ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C2P <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C2P, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2P <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C2P, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2P <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2P, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "CiIMD" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2P <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2P, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiEPX)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C2P, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>

############ C2N ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C2N <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD_C2N, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2N <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C2N, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2N <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2N, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2N, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2N <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2N, Endpt == "CiIMD" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |>
  left_join(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_C2N, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |>

RMSE_C1 <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$CiIMD_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("RMSE(C1) = ", RMSE_C1)
RMSE(C1) =  250.9419

Code 
fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 3000 
col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])

shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)

p_CiIMD_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiIMD_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_IMD
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$CiIMD_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiIMD_predobs
p_predobs
Code 
df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1 <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1 |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2_C1 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5_C1 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1 <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1 |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiIMD_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs
  )

CiIMD_count_fold2_C1 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$CiIMD_obs) * 100

CiIMD_count_fold5_C1 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1$CiIMD_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2_C1, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5_C1, 1), "%"
)
For weights : 

 Percentage of prediction in fold 2 =  100 %
 Percentage of prediction in fold 5 =  100 %
Code 
cat(
  "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold2_C1, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold5_C1, 1), "%"
)


For internal concentrations : 

 Percentage of prediction in fold 2 =  86.1 %
 Percentage of prediction in fold 5 =  100 %
Code 
fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2

      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,

    )+

    data=df_line,

    )+

    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,

  )+

    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+

    )+

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2_C1P <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5_C1P <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiIMD_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs
  )

CiIMD_count_fold2_C1P <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P$CiIMD_obs) * 100

CiIMD_count_fold5_C1P <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1P$CiIMD_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2_C1P, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5_C1P, 1), "%"
)
For weights : 

 Percentage of prediction in fold 2 =  100 %
 Percentage of prediction in fold 5 =  100 %
Code 
cat(
  "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold2_C1P, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold5_C1P, 1), "%"
)

 Percentage of prediction in fold 2 =  68.1 %
 Percentage of prediction in fold 5 =  93.1 %
Code 
fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[5])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 3000 
col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])

shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)

p_CiIMD_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiIMD_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_IMD
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N$CiIMD_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiIMD_predobs
p_predobs
Code 
df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2_C1N <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5_C1N <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1N$Weight_obs) * 100

  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiIMD_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs
  )

CiIMD_count_fold2_C1N <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N$CiIMD_obs) * 100

CiIMD_count_fold5_C1N <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1N$CiIMD_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2_C1N, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5_C1N, 1), "%"
)

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,

shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)

p_CiIMD_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2,

      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,

    color = col_line1
    )+

    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_IMD
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2$CiIMD_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiIMD_predobs
p_predobs

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P$predict.endpoint)
  )+

  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2])

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_IMD
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N$Weight_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 3000
col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])
shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)

p_CiIMD_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiIMD_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_IMD
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N$CiIMD_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(100, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiIMD_predobs
p_predobs
Code 
df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2_C2N <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5_C2N <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2N$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiIMD_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs
  )

CiIMD_count_fold2_C2N <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N$CiIMD_obs) * 100

CiIMD_count_fold5_C2N <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C2N$CiIMD_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2_C2N, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5_C2N, 1), "%"
)
For weights : 

 Percentage of prediction in fold 2 =  100 %
 Percentage of prediction in fold 5 =  100 %
Code 
cat(
  "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold2_C2N, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold5_C2N, 1), "%"
)


For internal concentrations : 

 Percentage of prediction in fold 2 =  87.5 %
 Percentage of prediction in fold 5 =  100 %
  • C1
  • C1P
  • C1N
  • C2
  • C2P
  • C2N
Code 
df_residuals_CiIMD_C1 <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind_C1 |> 
  mutate(
    Residual = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs,
    Ratio_Residual = predict.endpoint/CiIMD_obs
    ) |> 
  mutate(
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Group = factor(Group, c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Uptake bis")),
    Time_relative = case_when(
      Group == "Uptake" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "Uptake bis" ~ Time_point,
      Group == "Elimination" ~ Time_point - 21
    )
    )

p_residus <- ggplot(df_residuals_CiIMD_C1)+
  geom_point(
    aes(
      x = Time_point,
      y = Ratio_Residual,
      color = Group
    ),
    alpha=0.7
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Time point (days)",
    y = "Predicted/observed ratio"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = unique(df_residuals_CiIMD_C1$Time_point)
  )+
  scale_y_log10()+
  theme_minimal()

p_residus
