```{r, include=F}
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiIMD (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_CiIMD_traj_2 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1N_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1N_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1N_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C1N_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiIMD (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()
  
```

## Internal concentrations - Log-scale

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 100 ng/g of IMD. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-IMDdatapredfulllogC1N
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

p_CiIMD_traj_log <- p_CiIMD_traj + scale_y_log10()

p_CiIMD_traj_log

```

## Weights

```{r IMDpredcurvesdataWC1N, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Weight predictions
#| fig-label: fig-IMDdatapredfullWC1N
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

alpha_point <- 0.5

p_W <- ggplot()+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1N,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1N,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1N,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1N, 
    aes(
      x=Time, 
      ymax= up, 
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = Weight_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+

  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 1500))+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Weight (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_W

```

```{r savetrajC1N, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred.png", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1N
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred.svg", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1N
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred_log.png", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj_log , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1N
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred_log.svg", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj_log , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1N
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpredW.png", 
  plot=p_W , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1N
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpredW.svg", 
  plot=p_W , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1N
  )

ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred_1.png", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj_1, 
  width=8, height = 10, 
  path=path_fig_C1N
  )

ggsave(
  filename="TK_IMD_comptrajpred_2.png", 
  plot=p_CiIMD_traj_2 , 
  width=8, height = 10, 
  path=path_fig_C1N
  )
```
:::

## C2

::: panel-tabset
## Internal concentrations - Normal scale

```{r IMDpredcurvesdataC2, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 100 ng/g of IMD. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-IMDdatapredfullC2
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20


df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2 <- subset(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_C2, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_plot_C2 <- subset(df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_C2, ID %in% ID_tri)
df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C2 <- subset(df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C2, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

alpha_point <- 0.5
col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4])

p_CiIMD_traj <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  # facet_wrap(
  #   ~ID,
  #   ncol=4,
  #   #scales = "free_x"
  #   )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiIMD (ng/g)"
  )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 300))+
  theme_minimal()
  

p_CiIMD_traj 

```

```{r, include=F}

Time_point_1 <- as.character(seq(22, 42, 1))

df_phases_plot_1 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2_1 <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2 |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
dObs_ind_plot_1 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))

df_phases_plot_2 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2_2 <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2 |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
dObs_ind_plot_2 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)

p_CiIMD_traj_1 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiIMD (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_CiIMD_traj_2 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,

      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2_2,
    aes(

      ),

    )+

    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,

      ymin= low,

      ),

    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,

    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
```

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 100 ng/g of IMD. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model.
```

```{r IMDpredcurvesdataC2P, message=F, warning=F}
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),

    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
```

```{r, include=F}

Time_point_1 <- as.character(seq(22, 42, 1))

df_phases_plot_1 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))

      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiIMD (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_CiIMD_traj_2 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiIMD (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r IMDpredcurvesdataWC2P, message=F, warning=F}
    y = "Weight (g)"
  )+
```

## C2N

::: panel-tabset
## Internal concentrations - Normal scale

```{r IMDpredcurvesdataC2N, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 100 ng/g of IMD. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-IMDdatapredfullC2N
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20


df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2N <- subset(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_C2N, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_plot_C2N <- subset(df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_C2N, ID %in% ID_tri)
df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C2N <- subset(df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C2N, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

alpha_point <- 0.5
col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4])

p_CiIMD_traj <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2N,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2N,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2N,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2N,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiIMD_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  # facet_wrap(
  #   ~ID,
  #   ncol=4,
  #   #scales = "free_x"
  #   )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiIMD (ng/g)"
  )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 300))+
  theme_minimal()
  

p_CiIMD_traj 

```

```{r, include=F}

Time_point_1 <- as.character(seq(22, 42, 1))

df_phases_plot_1 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2N_1 <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2N |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
dObs_ind_plot_1 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))

df_phases_plot_2 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2N_2 <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2N |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
dObs_ind_plot_2 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)

p_CiIMD_traj_1 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,

    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

      ),

    data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot_C2N_1,

    name = "Phase"
    )+

  )+
  theme_minimal()
```

:::
:::::::::

### Simulation of the toxicodynamic in earthworms throughout the exposition

The goal here is to recreate the concentration dynamic in the average earthworm during our exposition scheme but without the fasting phase that was required for chemical analysis and during which elimination was happening.

```{r setpointin, message=F, warning=F}

Time_min <- 0
Time_max <- 42
Time_step <- 0.25
Time_pred <- seq(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step)
print_times <- paste(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step, sep=", ")

l_param_name_tot_C1 <- "kuIMD, keIMD, a_growth, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiIMD"
f_Setpoint(path_mod_IMD_C1, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot_C1)

l_param_name_tot_C1P <- "kuIMD, keIMD, a_growth, phi, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiIMD"
f_Setpoint(path_mod_IMD_C1P, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot_C1P)

l_param_name_tot_C1N <- "kuIMD, keIMD, a_growth, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiIMD"
f_Setpoint(path_mod_IMD_C1N, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot_C1N)

l_param_name_tot_C2 <- "kuIMD, keIMD, kperiph, a_growth, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiIMD"
f_Setpoint(path_mod_IMD_C2, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot_C2)

l_param_name_tot_C2P <- "kuIMD, keIMD, kperiph, a_growth, phi, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiIMD"
f_Setpoint(path_mod_IMD_C2P, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot_C2P)

l_param_name_tot_C2N <- "kuIMD, keIMD, kperiph, a_growth, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiIMD"
f_Setpoint(path_mod_IMD_C2N, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot_C2N)

```

```{bash, results=F, eval=F}
pwd
cd ..
cd ..
cd mod/TK_IMD
pwd
./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_Setpoint.in
wait
```

```{r IMDreadSetpoint, message=F, warning=F}

############ C1 ##################################

Sim.Res_C1 <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_IMD_C1, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t"))

  
  Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiIMD_1", "C_exposure_1")
  Nsortie = 3
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL

  for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res_C1), fixed=FALSE )
    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res_C1[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim)))

    }

  df_mod_C1 <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint,
    Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie))
    )
  
df_mod_Weight_C1 <- subset(df_mod_C1, Endpt == "Weight_1")
df_mod_CiIMD_C1 <- subset(df_mod_C1, Endpt == "CiIMD_1") 

############ C1P ##################################

Sim.Res_C1P <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_IMD_C1P, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t"))

  
  Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiIMD_1", "C_exposure_1")
  Nsortie = 3
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL

  for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res_C1P), fixed=FALSE )
    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res_C1P[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim)))

    }

  df_mod_C1P <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint,
    Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie))
    )
  
df_mod_Weight_C1P <- subset(df_mod_C1P, Endpt == "Weight_1")
df_mod_CiIMD_C1P <- subset(df_mod_C1P, Endpt == "CiIMD_1") 

############ C1N ##################################

Sim.Res_C1N <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_IMD_C1N, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t"))

  
  Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiIMD_1", "C_exposure_1")
  Nsortie = 3
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL

  for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res_C1N), fixed=FALSE )
    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res_C1N[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim)))

    }

  df_mod_C1N <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint,
    Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie))
    )
  
df_mod_Weight_C1N <- subset(df_mod_C1N, Endpt == "Weight_1")
df_mod_CiIMD_C1N <- subset(df_mod_C1N, Endpt == "CiIMD_1") 

############ C2 ##################################

Sim.Res_C2 <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_IMD_C2, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t"))

  
  Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiIMD_1", "C_exposure_1")
  Nsortie = 3
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL

  for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res_C2), fixed=FALSE )
    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res_C2[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim)))

    }

  df_mod_C2 <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint,
    Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie))
    )
  
df_mod_Weight_C2 <- subset(df_mod_C2, Endpt == "Weight_1")
df_mod_CiIMD_C2 <- subset(df_mod_C2, Endpt == "CiIMD_1") 

############ C2P ##################################

Sim.Res_C2P <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_IMD_C2P, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t"))

  
  Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiIMD_1", "C_exposure_1")
  Nsortie = 3
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL

  for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res_C2P), fixed=FALSE )
    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res_C2P[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim)))

    }

  df_mod_C2P <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint,
    Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie))
    )
  
df_mod_Weight_C2P <- subset(df_mod_C2P, Endpt == "Weight_1")
df_mod_CiIMD_C2P <- subset(df_mod_C2P, Endpt == "CiIMD_1") 

############ C2N ##################################

Sim.Res_C2N <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_IMD_C2N, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t"))

  
  Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiIMD_1", "C_exposure_1")
  Nsortie = 3
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL

  for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res_C2N), fixed=FALSE )
    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res_C2N[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim)))

    }

  df_mod_C2N <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint,
    Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie))
    )
  
df_mod_Weight_C2N <- subset(df_mod_C2N, Endpt == "Weight_1")
df_mod_CiIMD_C2N <- subset(df_mod_C2N, Endpt == "CiIMD_1") 


  # length(MPV)
  # length(df_Cin$Time)
  # length(Endpoint)
  # length(df_Cin$Experiment)
   
```

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r IMDpredcurvesC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 0.1 mg/kg of IMD. Blue points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represents the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band corresponds to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-IMDcurvemodC1
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4

alpha_point <- 0.5

p_CiIMD <- ggplot()+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_IMD
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint
      ),
    color = col_IMD,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiIMD_C1, 
    aes(
      x=Time, 
      ymax= up, 
      ymin= low
      ),
    fill = col_IMD,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Internal IMD concentration (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p <- p_CiIMD 
p

```

```{r savepredcurveC1, include = F}
  ggsave(
    filename="TK_IMD_predcurves_2.png", 
    plot=p, 
    width=5, height = 4, 
    path=path_fig_C1
    )
  ggsave(
    filename="TK_IMD_predcurves_2.svg", 
    plot=p, 
    width=5, height = 4, 
    path=path_fig_C1
    )
  
  # Poster version
  
p_poster <- p +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)
  )
  
  ggsave(
    filename="TK_IMD_predcurves_poster.png", 
    plot=p_poster, 
    width=3, height = 2.5, 
    path=path_fig_C1,
    bg = "transparent"
    )
```

```{r savepredcurveC1P, include = F}
    )

    )
```

:::
